characters.appearance: A South Asian man in his late 20s or early 30s with a medium build and a medium-dark complexion. He has short black hair, a full beard and mustache, and wears black-rimmed glasses.
characters.demeanor: Friendly, knowledgeable, and encouraging, often using hand gestures to emphasize his points while speaking directly to the camera.

scenes.supernova_script: Character A says: I've taught English for 9 years, and I can tell you why most of us freeze when we have to speak.
scenes.scene_summary:
- Replaces the 'fluency in 2 weeks' guarantee with a relatable, third-person hook.
- Names English immediately.
- Sets up the problem without attacking the viewer's personal attributes.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text:
I've taught English for 9 years...
Here is why most of us
freeze when speaking

scenes.supernova_script:
Character A says: You didn't learn Hindi by reading grammar books, you learned by speaking it.
Character A says: English works exactly the same way, but practicing in public is scary.
scenes.scene_summary:
- Lands Beat f (mother-tongue reframe).
- Removes the personal attack ('if you're afraid') and replaces it with a universal truth about public speaking anxiety.
- Prepares the pivot to the AI solution.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text:
You learned Hindi by speaking.
English works the same way.
But practicing in public is scary.

scenes.supernova_script:
Character A says: That's why you need Supernova. Meet Miss Nova, your personal AI teacher.
Character A says: She doesn't give everyone the same lesson. She analyzes your level and builds a plan just for you.
scenes.scene_summary:
- Introduces Supernova and names Miss Nova.
- Lands Beat a (Personalization) early in the ad.
- Removes the '7 days to activate your brain' guarantee.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text:
Meet Miss Nova, your AI teacher.
She analyzes your level
and builds a plan just for you.

scenes.scene_label: How It Works: Practice with People
scenes.supernova_script:
Character A says: Practice for a job interview at 3 a.m. Make a thousand mistakes, and she will never judge you.
Character A says: You speak, she listens, corrects you live, and explains the logic in Hindi.
scenes.scene_summary:
- Lands Beat b (Privacy/No-judgement) and Beat e (Job interview scenario).
- Lands Beat c (You speak) and Beat g (Logic in Hindi).
- Removes the 'talk to strangers' feature which is inaccurate for Supernova.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text:
Practice for a job interview.
Make 1000 mistakes, no judgement.
You speak, she corrects you live,
and explains the logic in Hindi.

scenes.supernova_script:
Character A says: Stop scrolling Reels for hours. Give Miss Nova just fifteen minutes a day.
Character A says: With daily practice, you'll start seeing visible progress in your confidence within a month.
scenes.scene_summary:
- Negative time anchor (Reels) + positive time anchor (15 mins/day).
- Replaces the 'unlock confidence in 2 weeks' absolute guarantee with a safe, hedged progress expectation.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text:
Stop scrolling Reels.
Just 15 minutes a day.
Start seeing visible progress
in about a month.

scenes.supernova_script: Character A says: Install the Supernova app and start speaking English today.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text:
Install Supernova App
and start speaking today

payload_audit.beats_covered: a (Personalization), b (Privacy/No-judgement), c (You speak), e (Job interview), f (Mother-tongue reframe), g (Logic in Hindi)
payload_audit.kept_from_seed: Inset presenter teaching over background visuals of classrooms, celebrities, and app UI.
payload_audit.price_check: No hard rupee figure or comparative price used.
